childhood.familyBackground: Paulsen comes from a prominent Swedish pharmaceutical and healthcare family. The Paulsen family established major pharmaceutical operations in Scandinavia.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 파울센은 저명한 스웨덴 제약 및 의료 가족 출신이다.
childhood.earlyLife: Paulsen worked in the pharmaceutical industry and eventually took leadership of family pharmaceutical operations. He expanded the business into biotech and medical devices.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 파울센은 제약 산업에서 일했고 결국 가족 제약 사업의 리더십을 인수했다.

careerTimeline.event: Took leadership of family pharmaceutical operations
Expanded operations into biotech and medical device manufacturing
careerTimeline.eventKo: 생명공학 및 의료 기기 제조로 운영 확장

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through diversified healthcare portfolio
careerTimeline.eventKo: 다양한 의료 포트폴리오를 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Several biotech drug candidates failed clinical trials resulting in significant losses
failures.descriptionKo: 여러 생명공학 약물 후보가 임상 시험 실패로 상당한 손실 초래
failures.lesson: Drug development requires long-term commitment and acceptance of research failures
failures.lessonKo: 약물 개발은 장기적 약속과 연구 실패 수용이 필요하다

quotes.text: Healthcare innovation requires courage to pursue breakthrough treatments
quotes.textKo: 의료 혁신은 획기적 치료를 추구할 용기가 필요하다

recommended.title: The Code Breaker
recommended.author: Walter Isaacson
recommended.note: Inspired his approach to breakthrough healthcare innovation
recommended.noteKo: 획기적 의료 혁신에 대한 접근 방식을 영감을 줌

personalTraits.knownFor: Pharmaceutical industry leadership; healthcare innovation; Scandinavian business prominence
personalTraits.knownForKo: 제약 산업 리더십; 의료 혁신; 스칸디나비아 비즈니스 두각
personalTraits.philanthropy: Major supporter of medical research and education in Sweden
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 스웨덴의 의료 연구 및 교육의 주요 지원자
